emails.subject:

 simulations
emails.subject_base:
Suggestion: implementing VAR based on non-normal log-returns
 simulations
emails.body: Re: Suggestion: implementing VAR based on non-normal log-returns simulations Everybody, we were talking for a while about using non-normal distributions in the Monte-Carlo simulations in our VAR model. I put together some suggestion regarding this. The text is under O:\_Dropbox\Tanya\non_normal_logs.doc Look through this 3 page document, and let me know what you think, please. Tanya
